items.title: Frontend build passes
items.precondition: Hotfix files are present in the hotfix worktree.
items.expected: TypeScript and Vite build complete successfully.
items.evidence: npm --prefix frontend run build exited 0 on 2026-07-15.
items.notes: Build warnings were existing bundle/chunk warnings, not hotfix errors.

items.title: Code Constitution strict convention check passes
items.precondition: Hotfix files are present in the hotfix worktree.
items.expected: No strict backend structural violations and no new frontend advisory violations from this hotfix.
items.notes: Existing Tier A advisories remained unrelated.

items.title: Refresh confirmation covers the Local Rankings map
items.precondition: Signed-in local admin/Pilot session available locally; One Endodontics Pilot user kuda@1endodontics.com can open Local Rankings competitor management.
steps: 1. Set the browser viewport to roughly 720px wide.
2. Open Local Rankings in Pilot mode.
3. Click Refresh competitors or the equivalent refresh suggestions control.
4. Confirm the map is dimmed behind the confirmation overlay and does not sit above the modal.
items.expected: The confirmation modal and backdrop render above Leaflet map panes and controls.
items.evidence: Browser QA on 2026-07-15: One Endodontics / Falls Church competitor manager opened locally. Clicking Refresh suggestions opened the confirmation modal. Computed styles showed the overlay class fixed inset-0 z-[1200] with z-index 1200; Leaflet panes and controls were at z-index 200, 400, 500, 600, 650, 700, and 1000. Proceed was not clicked.
items.notes: Validated through the local Pilot surface using the same Pilot embed flow; a temporary no-secret QA harness was removed before staging.

items.title: Pilot bug report opens when screenshot capture fails
items.precondition: Signed-in local Pilot session with the global support launcher visible.
steps: 2. Choose Bug report from a Pilot page with map or embedded content.
3. Confirm the Help ticket composer opens even if screenshot capture is unavailable.
items.expected: A bug-report composer opens with source URL and logs; screenshot attachment may be absent.
items.evidence: Browser QA on 2026-07-15: opened the support menu from the Pilot competitor manager, selected Bug report, and verified the New ticket composer opened with Bug report selected, source/log context available, and no ticket submitted.
items.notes: The composer opened with a console-log attachment and without requiring a screenshot file.
